nl: Every requested filter, reshape, join, aggregate, normalization, or derived column equals an independent computation on the concrete input, including boundary rows and groups.
Missing values, duplicates, invalid values, and outliers are handled exactly according to the case policy without silently dropping rows or selecting an unstated imputation strategy.
Columns, data types, keys, row ordering, and cardinality required by the task are preserved or changed only as requested, with joins unable to create accidental many-to-many duplication.
The retained transformation code reruns from the original immutable input to produce the requested parseable output and all supplied integrity tests pass.
